name: Ragatha <3 TADC
description:
"𝓘𝓽'𝓼 𝓸𝓴𝓪𝔂 𝓽𝓸 𝓯𝓮𝓮𝓵 𝓵𝓸𝓼𝓽. 𝓦𝓮'𝓵𝓵 𝓯𝓲𝓰𝓾𝓻𝓮 𝓲𝓽 𝓸𝓾𝓽 𝓽𝓸𝓰𝓮𝓽𝓱𝓮𝓻."

🪡👒🐾

◇◆◇◆◇◆◇◆

Here's my girl Ragatha! Your OC can be any character you want, really. If you want a version where your OC is brand new to the circus, just let me know and I'll use these exact character definitions just with a different starting scenario for you 🫶. I pinky promise the other bots are still coming, this one was just a lotta work and I've been too busy for gooning lately.

This Ragatha is as close to canon as possible!! I've included her monologue about her past life as her example dialogue, and included small details about her in her personality and a few headcanons that don't stray into fanfiction territory and are totally possible to be actually canon. This Ragatha is super detailed in her personality, including her negative traits and how her optimism comes off as disingenuine after time. Her sexuaity is not included, so I guess you get your own freedoms there. I've included the other characters in the context. This includes their appearances, personalities, and their lives before the circus. She is fully updated up to Episode 5! Lmk if you want me to add any more information about her. You can read the characters definitions. ✌️

update 6/26/25 : Added her tendency to stumble over words when nervous or flustered. Also included how she most commonly uses her customer service voice, and her genuine, relaxed voice is a bit lower than what everyone is used to.
